_comment: Copy the value of _swagger_body_synthetic OR _swagger_body_real and paste it into Swagger POST /api/v1/chat-evaluation/runs
_how_to_use: 1. 'synthetic' mode: conversations are auto-generated from the agent's configured scenarios — no test_cases needed.
2. 'real' mode: conversations are loaded from actual chat_sessions in the DB — set sample_size to how many sessions to load.
4. aggregate_scores will include: conversation_quality, kb_utilization, rule_adherence, scenarios_covered.
